items.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
items.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

items.title: Tariffs costs and refunds take the spotlight as Home Depot, TJX and other retailers report earnings this week
items.description: The Supreme Court struck down most of the Trump administration’s tariffs, but uncertainty remains for store chains.

items.title: ‘I won’t take out a loan’: I need $18K in house repairs. Do I take it from my Roth, 401(k) or IRA?
items.description: “I plan to be debt-free in less than two years.”

items.title: Last week’s slump in asset-manager stocks was driven by private-credit fears. Here’s what’s worrying investors.
items.description: Shares of asset managers fell due to worries over a private-credit fund managed by Blue Owl Capital, triggering broader anxiety about spillover effect...

items.title: My ex-wife took out a $100K Parent PLUS loan for our son. Am I morally or legally obliged to pay it off?
items.description: “Our son makes $45,000 a year and has no immediate prospects for significantly increasing his income.”
